abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This unit can be attached to the following units: ^^**Infractors, Noise Marines, Tormentors**^^

abilities.name: Euphoric Strikes
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Emperor's Children Terminator Squad.**^^

abilities.name: Doom Siren
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry**^^ unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy unit suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Feverish Butchery
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Obsessive Denunciation
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Perfectionists
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Lethal Hits^^] ability.

abilities.name: Sickening Stimulation
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed model (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to that unit.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Vehicle
abilities.text: Units can disembark from this **^^Vehicle**^^ after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

abilities.name: Scuttling Horrors
abilities.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abilities.name: Lethal Obsession
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, if it makes one or more shooting attacks and all of those attacks target the same enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time this unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is a target of that charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Lord of Excess
abilities.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Slaanesh Infantry^^**, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Excessive Vigour (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh^^** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Ecstatic Death
abilities.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Destruction
abilities.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6 for each of this model's remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Stimulated by Pain
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

statlines.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

models.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

abilities.name: Horrifying Beauty
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit in Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Icon
abilities.text: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abilities.name: Instrument of Chaos
abilities.text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abilities.name: Malefic Impact
abilities.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Lance^^] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Mounted Daemon**^^ units which share one of the following keywords with this model ^^**Khorne, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Tzeentch**^^

abilities.name: Murderer's Cowl
abilities.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Shadow's Caress
abilities.text: Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

abilities.name: Gloam Rot
abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Penumbral Puppetry
abilities.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Bloodmarked
abilities.text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Khorne**^^ unit makes an attack which targets that unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetraion and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Rage-fuelled Strength
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Restless Prey-seeker
abilities.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Jolly Gutpipes
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance moves made for it.

abilities.name: Keep Counting!
abilities.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Meet Your Quota!
abilities.text: While this model's unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Discordant Disruption (Aura)
abilities.text: While an enemy ^^**Psyker**^^ unit is within 12" of this model, Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Hazardous^^] ability.

abilities.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abilities.text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Soporific Musk
abilities.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and **^^Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Daemonic Patrons
abilities.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack. an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: No Prey Can Evade

abilities.name: Monarch of the Hunt
abilities.text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's quarry.

abilities.name: Warped Interference (Psychic)
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Wracking Agonies (Psychic)
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Objective Defiled
abilities.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Icon of Excess
abilities.text: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.
